data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the behavior of the persona when attempting to override a prohibited setting. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to this scenario, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of traces or snapshots that capture the outcome of the scenario means that the expected result cannot be confirmed as supported or actionable failure reports cannot be produced.
gaps: No evidence of scenario behavior when attempting to override prohibited settings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
